title: eragrostis minor subsp. roborovskii
intro: Eragrostis minor subsp. roborovskii is a subspecies of the Eragrostis minor plant, commonly known as lesser grass or false love grass. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Eragrostis minor subsp. roborovskii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
